##NAMES=Changoite
##RRUFFID=R110213
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Na_2_Zn(SO_4_)_2_·4H_2_O
##LOCALITY=La Compania mine, Caracoles, Sierra Gorda, II Region, Atacama Desert, Chile
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Gunnar Farber
##DESCRIPTION=Pale yellow transparent anhedral crystals associated with krohnkite and caracolite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed only by single crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R110213
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 10.945 b: 8.195 c: 5.5 alpha: 90 beta: 99.85 gamma: 90 volume: 486 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman Processed
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
